name: Stock Exchange Trading Platform Manipulation
description: Attack tree modelling compromise of stock exchange and trading platform infrastructure to manipulate market data, execute fraudulent trades, or disrupt market operations
root_objective: Manipulate trading systems for financial gain or market disruption

nodes.title: Manipulate Stock Exchange Trading Systems
nodes.description: Compromise exchange infrastructure to execute fraudulent trades, alter market data feeds, or disrupt trading operations

nodes.title: Compromise Trading Firm Infrastructure
nodes.description: Attack a market participant's trading systems to execute unauthorised trades

nodes.title: Hijack Algorithmic Trading Engine
nodes.description: Compromise a high-frequency trading firm's algo engine to execute manipulative trade strategies

nodes.title: Steal FIX Protocol Credentials
nodes.description: Capture FIX (Financial Information eXchange) session credentials to submit orders as a legitimate broker

nodes.title: Manipulate Market Data Feeds
nodes.description: Alter or inject false data into market data distribution systems

nodes.title: Inject False Price Quotes
nodes.description: Compromise a market data provider to inject incorrect price, volume, or order book data

nodes.title: Delay Market Data Distribution
nodes.description: Introduce latency into market data feeds to create informational asymmetry exploitable by a co-located attacker

nodes.title: Attack Exchange Matching Engine
nodes.description: Directly compromise the exchange's order matching infrastructure

nodes.title: Exploit Exchange Network Gateway
nodes.description: Compromise the network gateway handling order flow between brokers and the matching engine

nodes.title: Insider at Exchange Operations
nodes.description: Recruit or compromise a staff member with access to exchange production systems

nodes.title: Disrupt Trading Operations
nodes.description: Cause extended market outage for reputational damage or to cover other operations

nodes.title: DDoS Exchange Order Gateway
nodes.description: Overwhelm exchange order submission gateways with massive traffic to halt trading

nodes.title: Ransomware on Clearing Systems
nodes.description: Deploy ransomware targeting post-trade clearing and settlement systems to freeze all transactions
